conclusions.why_not_down_proj_forward_hook: A forward hook on down_proj changes the residual-space output of size 960, not the FFN activation vector of size 2560. That means it does not match the paper's intervention operator.
conclusions.smolvla_specific_note: Steering happens inside the SmolVLA VLM text backbone, while the final robot actions are produced by a downstream action expert. This is an adaptation of the paper rather than a literal one-to-one reproduction.
